text.message: Don’t plow for the sake of plowing
Well the game decided I should
I was about to point the other way
If you give me future brick I won’t plow
The game is not correct when making these decisions
It's like when you play with bots
Have a sheep for good behavior
Just trying to see if I could potentially know you
I don’t know anyone from needham
Do you know someone named Kaia per chance
Pull up to the Jo licks in Newton center I’ll give you free ice cream
